data.description: You have training in physical fitness and agility.
Your score in Charisma increases by 1, to a maximum of 20. You gain advantage on Charisma (Deception) and Charisma (Performance) checks when trying to pass yourself off as someone else.

When you use the Attack action on a creature within 5 feet of an enemy you hit with that attack, you can make another attack with the same weapon against another creature within 5 feet of the first target (to a maximum of two such attacks).

Your quick reflexes and combat acumen allow you to parry attacks easily. You have advantage on Wisdom saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep. Additionally, you can add your proficiency bonus to the AC you calculate from your armor, provided you aren't wearing heavy armor.
You have practiced fighting with two weapons. When you wield two light melee weapons, you gain the benefits of the Dueling fighting style even if you don't have the Dueling feat.
